channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Less than a month after winning the World Series, the Los Angeles Dodgers are spending big again to add one of baseball's best pitchers to their star-studded roster.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blake Snell defects to Dodgers from SF Giants
item.description: After one up-and-down season in San Francisco that included a no-hitter, Snell is heading to the Giants' biggest rivals.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Tiger Woods announces he will not play in tournament he hosts annually
item.description: Tiger Woods announced Monday that he will not participate in next month's Hero World Challenge as he recovers from another back surgery.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league’s leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks’ NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dejounte Murray is rejoining the Pelicans vs. Toronto and drawing inspiration from his mother
item.description: METAIRIE, La. (AP) — Dejounte Murray plans to return to the New Orleans Pelicans ' lineup on Wednesday night for the first time since fracturing his left hand in a season-opening victory over Chicago on Oct. 23.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lewandowski joins Ronaldo and Messi in Champions League 100-goal club. Haaland nets 2 but City draws
item.description: ROME (AP) — Robert Lewandowski joined Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the only players in Champions League history with 100 or more goals. But Erling Haaland is on a faster pace than anyone by boosting his total to 46 goals at age 24 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oklahoma's throwback offensive approach against Alabama gets LSU's attention
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Oklahoma appears to have borrowed from the past to cure its recent offensive ills. The Sooners, best known this century for a passing prowess that has produced four Heisman Trophy-winning quarterbacks, took it back to the 20th century against then-No. 7 Alabama.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lionel Messi has his new coach: Javier Mascherano's hiring by Inter Miami is now complete
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Lionel Messi and Javier Mascherano are together again, this time with Inter Miami. The former Barcelona and Argentina teammates have reunited, with Inter Miami announcing Tuesday that Mascherano's hiring as the club's new coach is complete.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ruling in doping case set to give biathlon star Fourcade a gold 15 years after Vancouver Olympics
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Almost 15 years after the Vancouver Olympics, a ruling by sport's highest court in a Russian doping case is set to give French biathlon star Martin Fourcade another gold medal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New stadium, new look: Salt Lake Bees unveil 2025 logos, uniforms
item.description: It's a whole new era for the Salt Lake Bees as they prepare for their move to South Jordan where they will play in their brand new home of Daybreak Field.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Williams unable to carry Bears to victory, Chicago loses in OT to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Caleb Williams put on the Superman cape at the end of the fourth quarter, but the Chicago Bears still couldn't get out of their own way in an overtime loss to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday at Soldier Field. Here's a breakdown of how the game transpired.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5
